preconditions.source_context: Assignment-support business monetizing via custom quotes and upfront payment for CII coursework support.
preconditions.central_search_intent: Get professional assignment writing help to pass CII insurance qualifications without failing modules
preconditions.topical_border_definition: Included: CII qualification support topics directly tied to assignment help, module-specific guidance, qualification-level support, trust and study-support topics that strengthen conversion and topical relevance for CII learners. Excluded: generic university essay writing, unrelated insurance news, broad finance careers without a direct bridge to CII qualifications, and non-CII certification ecosystems unless used as comparative outer-section support.

blocking_issues: The local environment does not currently have the anthropic package installed.
The repo uses a directory named .env rather than a dotenv file, so API loading depends on environment variables already being exported.
A full audit run will need live network access for site fetching and likely for model calls.
next_action: Install the anthropic dependency, confirm model/API access, then run entity discovery, topical map building, query analysis, and scoring against this initialized client workspace.
